message_text: Coach, I’m struggling with my drive phase. My hip extension seems limited, and my ground contact time in the first 10m is still too high. Any biomechanical adjustments I should focus on?
Also, my force application angles seem off during my acceleration phase. Should I be pushing more horizontally or vertically after 20m?
I reviewed my video analysis, and my shin angle at blocks is around 42 degrees. Should I aim to get it lower for better force production?
During my maximal velocity phase, I feel like my knee drive is not high enough, and my swing phase isn’t efficient. How can I optimize my front-side mechanics?
Thanks, Coach! I’ll apply these cues in my session tomorrow and see if I can get my ground contact time below 0.09s in my top-end speed phase.
